slides.title: The problem
slides.copy: Financial modeling with generic AI is fast, but often hard to verify.

slides.title: The boundary
slides.copy: AndyAI Finance Engine separates proof from execution.

slides.title: The workflow
slides.copy: Input, draft model, evidence review, human approval, export readiness.

slides.title: The pilot
slides.copy: Start with a controlled, read-only pilot before production automation.
